DEGREE WORKS TRANSFER CREDIT DETAIL - SYNTHETIC TEST DATA

Transfer Institution Credit Accepted

Transfer and exam credit equivalencies in this synthetic audit require advisor verification and are not proof that an official requirement is complete.
